title: sisyrinchium junceum subsp. depauperatum
intro: Sisyrinchium junceum subsp. depauperatum, commonly known as blue-eyed grass, is a perennial plant species in the iris family. This plant has been used for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antiviral properties, which can help to soothe skin irritations and wounds. The health benefits of sisyrinchium junceum subsp. depauperatum include reducing inflammation, promoting wound healing, and supporting immune function. Herbal preparations of this plant can be found in the form of tinctures, infusions, and salves, which can be used topically or taken internally to harness its medicinal properties.
